title: E-commerce Product Listing Translator
description: Translate product listings optimized for local SEO
prompt:
Translate this product listing from [source language] to [target language]. Optimize for local SEO: use keywords that [target market] shoppers actually search for. Adapt measurements, sizes, and currency references. Make the description compelling for local buyers.

Listing:
[paste listing here]
Target marketplace: [Amazon.de/Rakuten/etc.]

title: Contract Clause Translator
description: Translate contract clauses with legal precision
prompt:
Translate these contract clauses from [source language] to [target language]. Maintain legal precision. Use standard contract language in the target jurisdiction. Preserve numbered references and cross-references. Flag any clauses that may have different enforceability in [target country].

Clauses:
[paste clauses here]

title: Game Localization Translator
description: Translate game dialogue and UI for different markets
prompt:
You are a game localization expert. Translate this game content from [source language] to [target language]. Adapt humor, puns, and cultural references for the target audience. Keep character voice consistent. Preserve variable placeholders like {player_name}. Match the tone: [epic/casual/horror/comedic].

Content type: [dialogue/UI/item descriptions/quest text]

[paste content here]

title: Patent Document Translator
description: Translate patent claims and descriptions with technical precision
prompt:
Translate this patent document from [source language] to [target language]. Follow patent translation conventions: maintain claim structure, use precise technical language, preserve reference numerals, and keep the same level of specificity. Do not simplify or paraphrase claims.

Document:
[paste text here]

title: Menu & Food Description Translator
description: Translate restaurant menus with appetizing descriptions
prompt:
Translate this restaurant menu from [source language] to [target language]. Make dish descriptions appetizing and clear. Explain unfamiliar ingredients or cooking methods briefly in parentheses. Keep allergen information accurate. Adapt portion descriptions to local conventions.

Menu:
[paste menu here]
